---
name: tracker-update
description: "Update status trackers with evidence-backed progress. Use when: editing status_tracker.md, status-tracker-sprintwise-v1.md, and release/hardening progress summaries."
argument-hint: "Update scope, e.g. 'session refresh for R2'"
---
# Tracker Update Skill

## Rules
- Always update both tracker files together.
- Keep wording factual and tied to current artifacts.
- Maintain consistent timestamps/session labels across sections.
- Avoid speculative completion claims.

## Checklist
- [ ] Release table updated
- [ ] Sprint summary updated
- [ ] Gate reality check updated (if needed)
- [ ] Requirement/workstream rows remain consistent

## Output
- List of edited sections and why they changed.
- Evidence references used.
